## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes include tests that cover the new behaviour
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] I have signed the [CLA](../CLA.md) (first-time contributors only)

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Include commands or steps a reviewer can follow to verify the behaviour.

## Additional Notes

Anything else a reviewer should know (migration steps, follow-up issues, known limitations, etc.).
